title: Paul Lewis
compiled_truth: Paul Lewis is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-05-24 to 2002-02-07), Paul Lewis sent 13 and received 174 emails, totalling 187 interactions. Top correspondents: [W  White](people/w-white) (12), [Casey Evans](people/casey-evans) (9), [Andrea Dahlke](people/andrea-dahlke) (5), [Wayne Vinson](people/wayne-vinson) (4), [Tom Chapman](people/tom-chapman) (4).
